data.title: Despite Iran's attacks on UAE, war has not resumed, US Gen. Dan Caine says | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth added that the US established a "red, white, and blue dome" over the Strait of Hormuz as a "gift from the US to the world."
data.keywords: Iran,Donald Trump,South Korea,strait of hormuz,Pete Hegseth,Dan Caine
